div.p: Even with naive scheduling, each stage must store activations for the backward pass. For a 70B model with batch=8, seq=4096:

ul.li: Must persist until backward pass completes.

p.strong: For P stages and M micro-batches:

div.p: With P = 4 stages and M = 1 micro-batch:

ul.li: Total active: 2 units Total Timeline: 4 units Utilization = 2 / 4 = 50% ⚠️ 3/4 GPUs are idle at any time.

ol.li: Sequential dependency: Stages wait for the predecessor.
No parallelism: Only one stage computes at a time.
Waste: Paying for 4 GPUs, getting 1 GPU worth of throughput. Solution: Micro-batching.
